what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry: an images-type attachment (att-e012b3ae) in the design-assets channel, pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (57) and stamped with an added datetime.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Target URI contains literal spaces and parentheses: image://design-assets/icons/image (57)
File is purely metadata with no descriptive body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata
Id prefix att- for attachment records
References target via a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which is unusual and may cause parsing/escaping issues
No dimensions, alt text, mime type, or file size recorded
notes: This file is a bare ledger stub that registers an image attachment in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (57).
questions: Is the space and parenthetical number in the target URI intentional or a filename artifact?
What is the relationship between this attachment record and the actual image file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual content: it records an image attachment metadata entry, though it contains only minimal fields.
intention_signals: It tries to catalog an image asset attached to the design-assets channel so the attachment can be tracked and later resolved via its target URI.
novelty: The target URI includes literal whitespace and parentheses, which is atypical for a clean resource identifier.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between an attachment id, a channel, and an image target URI for retrieval and ledger consistency.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry (att-e012b3ae) for the design-assets channel recording an images-type attachment pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (57) with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register a design-assets image attachment so it can be tracked and referenced within the channel-memory ledger.
